statements.impact_statement: GnuPG vulnerability in OS packages (dirmngr, gnupg, gpg, gpg-agent, gpgconf, gpgsm, gpgv, keyboxd, gnupg-utils). GnuPG is installed in the Docker image for package signature verification during build but is not invoked at runtime by Liquibase. The Liquibase application does not call any GnuPG binaries.
